<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Para você ❤️</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Playfair+Display:ital@1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
  --bg:      #3a2a2e;
  --surface: #472f34;
  --border:  rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
  --accent:  #e07a8f;
  --accent2: #f0aab6;
  --gold:    #d4aa70;
  --text:    #f8eeee;
  --muted:   #b09098;
  --glow:    rgba(224,122,143,0.3);
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 300;
  min-height: 100vh;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* petals */
#petals {
  position: fixed; inset: 0;
  pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; overflow: hidden;
}
.petal {
  position: absolute; bottom: -10px; opacity: 0;
  animation: rise linear infinite;
}
@keyframes rise {
  0%   { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg) scale(0.8); }
  8%   { opacity: 0.45; }
  92%  { opacity: 0.1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-108vh) rotate(400deg) scale(1.1); }
}

/* layout */
.page {
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
  max-width: 620px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 20px 90px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0;
}

/* hero — contained photo with border */
.hero {
  width: 100%;
  position: relative;
  border-radius: 20px;
  overflow: hidden;
  aspect-ratio: 3/4;
  max-height: 520px;
  cursor: pointer;
  margin-top: 16px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(224,122,143,0.3);
  box-shadow:
    0 0 0 4px rgba(224,122,143,0.07),
    0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.45),
    0 0 60px rgba(224,122,143,0.08);
}
.hero img {
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover; display: block;
  transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(.25,.46,.45,.94);
}
.hero:hover img { transform: scale(1.03); }

/* gradient overlay */
.hero-overlay {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(
    to bottom,
    rgba(58,42,46,0.0)  0%,
    rgba(58,42,46,0.05) 40%,
    rgba(58,42,46,0.60) 72%,
    rgba(58,42,46,0.92) 100%
  );
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 28px 44px;
  text-align: center;
}
.hero-pre {
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: 0.32em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--gold);
  opacity: 0.85;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  animation: upfade 1.2s 0.2s ease both;
}
.hero-title {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-style: italic;
  font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 9vw, 3.6rem);
  font-weight: 400;
  color: #fff;
  line-height: 1.15;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
  text-shadow: 0 2px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  animation: upfade 1.2s 0.35s ease both;
}
.hero-caption {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
  font-weight: 300;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  animation: upfade 1.2s 0.5s ease both;
}
.scroll-hint {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 18px; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  animation: upfade 1.2s 1s ease both, bobble 2s 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  opacity: 0.4;
}
.scroll-hint span { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #fff; }
.scroll-hint svg { width: 18px; opacity: 0.7; }
@keyframes bobble {
  0%,100% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
  50%      { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(5px); }
}

/* ─────────────────────────────
   CONTENT below hero
───────────────────────────── */
.content {
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 52px;
  padding-top: 60px;
}

@keyframes upfade {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

/* counter */
.counter { width: 100%; }
.counter-label {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 13px;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 14px;
  font-weight: 400;
}
.c-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 8px;
}
.c-box {
  background: var(--surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 12px 4px 10px;
  text-align: center;
}
.c-num {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 4vw, 1.9rem);
  color: var(--text);
  line-height: 1;
}
.c-unit {
  font-size: 9px;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-top: 6px;
}

/* extra photos */
.extra-section { width: 100%; }
.section-label {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 13px;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.extra-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 8px;
}
.extra-item {
  aspect-ratio: 1;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.extra-item img {
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  transition: transform 0.4s ease;
}
.extra-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.07); }

/* player — mini bar above hero */
.player {
  width: 100%;
  background: var(--surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 12px 14px 11px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.p-row {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.vinyl {
  width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
  background: radial-gradient(circle,
    #180d10 18%, #2e1520 34%, #180d10 36%,
    #3d1a26 52%, #180d10 54%,
    #e07a8f 68%, #f0aab6 74%, #e07a8f 80%,
    #180d10 82%);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 10px var(--glow);
  animation: spin 5s linear infinite paused;
  position: relative;
}
.vinyl::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; margin: auto;
  width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--bg); border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
}
.vinyl.playing { animation-play-state: running; }
@keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

.p-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.p-title {
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
  white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
.p-artist { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 1px; }

.p-progress { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.p-time { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); min-width: 26px; }
.p-time:last-child { text-align: right; }
.p-bar {
  flex: 1; height: 3px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer;
}
.p-fill {
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
  border-radius: 3px; width: 0%;
  transition: width 0.3s linear;
  position: relative;
}
.p-fill::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute; right: -4px; top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 9px; height: 9px;
  background: var(--accent2); border-radius: 50%;
  opacity: 0; transition: opacity .2s;
  box-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--glow);
}
.p-bar:hover .p-fill::after { opacity: 1; }

.p-controls {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 18px; margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.p-btn {
  background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
  color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.85rem;
  transition: color .2s, transform .15s;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
.p-btn:hover { color: var(--text); transform: scale(1.1); }
.p-btn.main {
  width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
  color: #fff; font-size: 0.85rem;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 10px var(--glow);
}
.p-btn.main:hover { transform: scale(1.08); }

.p-vol { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
.p-vol span { font-size: 11px; }
.vol-sl {
  flex: 1; -webkit-appearance: none;
  height: 2px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-radius: 2px; outline: none; cursor: pointer;
}
.vol-sl::-webkit-slider-thumb {
  -webkit-appearance: none; width: 9px; height: 9px;
  background: var(--muted); border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer;
}

/* message */
.message {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0 8px 0;
}
.msg-heart {
  font-size: 2rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 24px;
  animation: pulse 2.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes pulse {
  0%,100% { transform: scale(1); }
  50%      { transform: scale(1.14); }
}
.message p {
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.15rem);
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 2;
  color: #d8cdcd;
  margin-bottom: 28px;
  font-style: italic;
}
.message .sig {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-style: italic;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  color: var(--accent2);
}
.message .sig::before { content: '— '; }

/* lightbox */
/* milestones */
.milestones { width: 100%; }
.ms-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 10px;
}
.ms-item {
  background: var(--surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 16px 10px 14px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: border-color 0.4s, box-shadow 0.4s;
}
.ms-item.done {
  border-color: rgba(224,122,143,0.45);
  box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(224,122,143,0.12);
}
.ms-item.done .ms-check {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
  border-color: transparent;
}
.ms-item.done .ms-check::after { opacity: 1; }
.ms-item.done .ms-label { color: var(--text); }
.ms-item.done .ms-date  { color: var(--accent2); opacity: 0.9; }

/* red special item */
.ms-item.red {
  border-color: rgba(210,50,70,0.5);
  box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(210,50,70,0.18);
}
.ms-item.red .ms-check {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c0283c, #e05060);
  border-color: transparent;
}
.ms-item.red .ms-label { color: #f5c0c8; }
.ms-item.red .ms-date  { color: #e05060; opacity: 0.9; }

.ms-check {
  width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%;
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
  margin: 0 auto 10px; position: relative;
  transition: background 0.4s, border-color 0.4s;
}
.ms-check::after {
  content: '✓'; position: absolute; inset: 0;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 13px; color: #fff; font-weight: 700;
  opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s;
}
.ms-label {
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 4px; transition: color 0.4s;
}
.ms-date {
  font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted);
  opacity: 0.55; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

.ms-more {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 10px 0 4px;
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  opacity: 0.4;
}
.ms-more::before { content: '· · · · · · · · ·'; display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.3em; }

#lb {
  display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.93); z-index: 999;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 20px;
}
#lb.open { display: flex; }
#lb img { max-width: 100%; max-height: 90vh; border-radius: 10px; display: block; }
#lb button {
  position: absolute; top: 18px; right: 22px;
  background: none; border: none; color: #fff;
  font-size: 1.8rem; cursor: pointer; opacity: .5;
  font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
}

/* scroll reveal */
.reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(28px); transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease; }
.reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

/* responsive */
@media (max-width: 420px) {
  .c-num { font-size: 1.7rem; }
  .extra-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .p-controls { gap: 16px; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="petals"></div>

<div class="page">

  <!-- player — compact bar above photo -->
  <div class="player reveal" style="margin-top:28px;">
    <div class="p-row">
      <div class="vinyl" id="vinyl"></div>
      <div class="p-info">
        <div class="p-title" id="pTitle">Mensagem de voz</div>
        <div class="p-artist" id="pArtist">nossa música ❤️</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="p-progress">
      <span class="p-time" id="pCur">0:00</span>
      <div class="p-bar" id="pBar"><div class="p-fill" id="pFill"></div></div>
      <span class="p-time" id="pTot">0:00</span>
    </div>
    <div class="p-controls">
      <button class="p-btn" id="btnRep">↺</button>
      <button class="p-btn">⏮</button>
      <button class="p-btn main" id="btnPlay">▶</button>
      <button class="p-btn">⏭</button>
      <button class="p-btn" id="btnShu">⇄</button>
    </div>
    <div class="p-vol">
      <span>🔈</span>
      <input type="range" class="vol-sl" id="volSl" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="0.8">
      <span>🔊</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- HERO — image first -->
  <div class="hero" id="heroWrap">
    <img id="mainImg"
      src="data:image/png;base64,"
      alt="Nossa foto">
    <div class="hero-overlay">
      <p class="hero-caption">22 · 12 · 2025</p>
    </div>
    <div class="scroll-hint">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/></svg>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- rest of content -->
  <div class="content">

    <!-- counter -->
    <div class="counter reveal">
      <p class="counter-label">Juntos há</p>
      <div class="c-grid">
        <div class="c-box"><div class="c-num" id="cM">0</div><div class="c-unit">meses</div></div>
        <div class="c-box"><div class="c-num" id="cD">0</div><div class="c-unit">dias</div></div>
        <div class="c-box"><div class="c-num" id="cH">0</div><div class="c-unit">horas</div></div>
        <div class="c-box"><div class="c-num" id="cS">00</div><div class="c-unit">segundos</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- extra photos (hidden until photos added) -->
    <div class="extra-section reveal" id="extraSection" style="display:none">
      <p class="section-label">nossos momentos</p>
      <div class="extra-grid" id="extraGrid"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- message -->
    <div class="message reveal">
      <span class="msg-heart">💗</span>
      <p id="msgText">
        Você é a pessoa mais especial da minha vida.<br>
        Em cada sorriso seu, encontro a minha razão de sorrir.<br>
        Em cada abraço, o lar que sempre procurei.<br><br>
        Obrigado por existir, por me escolher todos os dias,<br>
        por ser luz nos meus dias escuros<br>
        e cor nos meus dias cinzas.<br><br>
        Te amo mais do que qualquer palavra consegue expressar.
      </p>
      <p class="sig" id="sigEl">Sempre seu ❤️</p>
    </div>

    <!-- milestones -->
    <div class="milestones reveal">
      <p class="section-label">nossas conquistas</p>
      <div class="ms-grid" id="msGrid"></div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /content -->
</div><!-- /page -->

<!-- lightbox -->
<div id="lb">
  <button onclick="closeLb()">✕</button>
  <img id="lbImg" src="" alt="">
</div>

<!-- hidden file inputs -->
<input type="file" id="audioFile"  accept="audio/*"  style="display:none">
<input type="file" id="mainPhoto"  accept="image/*"  style="display:none">
<input type="file" id="extraFiles" accept="image/*" multiple style="display:none">

<!-- dev bar (only with ?dev in URL) -->
<div id="devBar" style="display:none;position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;
  background:rgba(20,15,15,0.96);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  padding:10px 16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center;z-index:500;">
  <style>
    #devBar button {
      background: rgba(224,122,143,.14);
      border: 1px solid rgba(224,122,143,.28);
      color: #f0aab6; padding: 7px 14px;
      border-radius: 20px; cursor: pointer;
      font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size: 12px;
    }
    #devBar button:hover { background: rgba(224,122,143,.28); }
  </style>
  <button onclick="document.getElementById('audioFile').click()">🎵 Música</button>
  <button onclick="document.getElementById('mainPhoto').click()">📷 Foto principal</button>
  <button onclick="document.getElementById('extraFiles').click()">🖼️ + Fotos</button>
  <button onclick="editMsg()">✏️ Mensagem</button>
  <button onclick="editSig()">✍️ Assinatura</button>
  <button onclick="editCaption()">🏷️ Legenda</button>
</div>

<script>
/* petals */
(function(){
  const c = document.getElementById('petals');
  const chars = ['🌸','✨','❤️','🌹','💕','🩷'];
  for(let i=0;i<28;i++){
    const p = document.createElement('div');
    p.className = 'petal';
    p.textContent = chars[Math.floor(Math.random()*chars.length)];
    const d = 13 + Math.random()*16;
    p.style.cssText = `left:${Math.random()*100}%;font-size:${9+Math.random()*10}px;
      animation-duration:${d}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*d}s;`;
    c.appendChild(p);
  }
})();

/* scroll reveal */
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, { threshold: 0.12 });
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));

/* counter */
const START = new Date('2025-12-22T00:00:00');
function tick(){
  const now = new Date(); if(now<START) return;
  let months=0, base=new Date(START);
  while(true){ const nx=new Date(base); nx.setMonth(nx.getMonth()+1); if(nx>now) break; months++; base=nx; }
  const rem=Math.floor((now-base)/1000);
  const days=Math.floor(rem/86400), rr=rem-days*86400;
  const hours=Math.floor(rr/3600), secs=rr%60;
  document.getElementById('cM').textContent=months;
  document.getElementById('cD').textContent=days;
  document.getElementById('cH').textContent=hours;
  document.getElementById('cS').textContent=String(secs).padStart(2,'0');
}
tick(); setInterval(tick,1000);

/* milestones */
(function(){
  const fmtDate = d => `${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')}/${String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')}/${d.getFullYear()}`;
  const grid = document.getElementById('msGrid');
  const now = new Date();

  const fixed = [
    { label: '1 mês',   months: 1,  red: false },
    { label: '2 meses', months: 2,  red: true  },
    { label: '3 meses', months: 3,  red: false },
    { label: '4 meses', months: 4,  red: false },
    { label: '5 meses', months: 5,  red: false },
    { label: '6 meses', months: 6,  red: false },
  ];

  // fixed months
  fixed.forEach(m => {
    const target = new Date(START);
    target.setMonth(target.getMonth() + m.months);
    const done = now >= target;
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    const cls = m.red && done ? 'ms-item red' : done ? 'ms-item done' : 'ms-item';
    el.className = cls;
    el.innerHTML = `<div class="ms-check"></div>
      <div class="ms-label">${m.label}</div>
      <div class="ms-date">${fmtDate(target)}</div>`;
    grid.appendChild(el);
  });

  // yearly: generate enough to always show at least 3 future ones
  let yr = 1;
  let futureSeen = 0;
  while(futureSeen < 3) {
    const target = new Date(START);
    target.setFullYear(target.getFullYear() + yr);
    const done = now >= target;
    const label = yr === 1 ? '1 ano' : `${yr} anos`;
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = done ? 'ms-item done' : 'ms-item';
    el.innerHTML = `<div class="ms-check"></div>
      <div class="ms-label">${label}</div>
      <div class="ms-date">${fmtDate(target)}</div>`;
    grid.appendChild(el);
    if(!done) futureSeen++;
    yr++;
  }

  // infinite indicator
  const more = document.createElement('div');
  more.className = 'ms-more';
  more.textContent = 'e muito mais por vir…';
  grid.appendChild(more);
})();

/* player */
const aud=document.getElementById('bgAudio'); aud.volume=0.8;
let playing=false, repeat=false;
const vinyl=document.getElementById('vinyl');
const btnPlay=document.getElementById('btnPlay');
const pFill=document.getElementById('pFill');
const pBar=document.getElementById('pBar');
const fmt=s=>`${Math.floor(s/60)}:${String(Math.floor(s%60)).padStart(2,'0')}`;

aud.addEventListener('timeupdate',()=>{
  if(!aud.duration) return;
  pFill.style.width=(aud.currentTime/aud.duration*100)+'%';
  document.getElementById('pCur').textContent=fmt(aud.currentTime);
  document.getElementById('pTot').textContent=fmt(aud.duration);
});
aud.addEventListener('ended',()=>{
  if(repeat){aud.currentTime=0;aud.play();}
  else{playing=false;btnPlay.textContent='▶';vinyl.classList.remove('playing');}
});

function startPlay(){
  if(!aud.src||playing) return;
  aud.play().then(()=>{
    playing=true; btnPlay.textContent='⏸'; vinyl.classList.add('playing');
  }).catch(()=>{});
}

/* try autoplay immediately */
window.addEventListener('load', ()=>{ setTimeout(startPlay, 600); });

/* fallback: play on first touch/click anywhere */
function unlockAudio(){
  startPlay();
  document.removeEventListener('click', unlockAudio);
  document.removeEventListener('touchstart', unlockAudio);
}
document.addEventListener('click', unlockAudio);
document.addEventListener('touchstart', unlockAudio);

btnPlay.addEventListener('click',()=>{
  if(!aud.src){document.getElementById('audioFile').click();return;}
  if(playing){aud.pause();btnPlay.textContent='▶';vinyl.classList.remove('playing');}
  else{aud.play();btnPlay.textContent='⏸';vinyl.classList.add('playing');}
  playing=!playing;
});
pBar.addEventListener('click',e=>{
  if(!aud.duration) return;
  const r=pBar.getBoundingClientRect();
  aud.currentTime=((e.clientX-r.left)/r.width)*aud.duration;
});
document.getElementById('volSl').addEventListener('input',e=>aud.volume=e.target.value);
document.getElementById('btnRep').addEventListener('click',function(){repeat=!repeat;this.style.color=repeat?'var(--accent2)':'';});
document.getElementById('btnShu').addEventListener('click',function(){this._on=!this._on;this.style.color=this._on?'var(--accent2)':'';});

document.getElementById('audioFile').addEventListener('change',function(){
  const f=this.files[0]; if(!f) return;
  aud.src=URL.createObjectURL(f); aud.load();
  const parts=f.name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/,'').split(' - ');
  document.getElementById('pTitle').textContent=parts.length>=2?parts.slice(1).join(' - '):f.name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/,'');
  document.getElementById('pArtist').textContent=parts.length>=2?parts[0]:'nossa música ❤️';
  aud.addEventListener('canplay', function once(){
    aud.removeEventListener('canplay', once);
    aud.play().then(()=>{ playing=true; btnPlay.textContent='⏸'; vinyl.classList.add('playing'); }).catch(()=>{});
  });
});

/* main photo */
document.getElementById('mainPhoto').addEventListener('change',function(){
  const f=this.files[0]; if(!f) return;
  document.getElementById('mainImg').src=URL.createObjectURL(f);
});
document.getElementById('mainImg').addEventListener('click',()=>{
  const s=document.getElementById('mainImg').src;
  if(s.includes('svg+xml')) return;
  openLb(s);
});

/* extra photos */
let extras=[];
document.getElementById('extraFiles').addEventListener('change',function(){
  Array.from(this.files).forEach(f=>{
    const r=new FileReader();
    r.onload=ev=>{extras.push(ev.target.result);renderExtras();};
    r.readAsDataURL(f);
  });
});
function renderExtras(){
  const g=document.getElementById('extraGrid');
  const sec=document.getElementById('extraSection');
  g.innerHTML='';
  if(extras.length===0){sec.style.display='none';return;}
  sec.style.display='';
  extras.forEach(src=>{
    const el=document.createElement('div');
    el.className='extra-item';
    el.innerHTML=`<img src="${src}" alt="">`;
    el.addEventListener('click',()=>openLb(src));
    g.appendChild(el);
  });
}

/* lightbox */
function openLb(src){document.getElementById('lbImg').src=src;document.getElementById('lb').classList.add('open');}
function closeLb(){document.getElementById('lb').classList.remove('open');}
document.getElementById('lb').addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target===this)closeLb();});

/* dev bar */
if(location.search.includes('dev'))
  document.getElementById('devBar').style.display='flex';

/* edit helpers */
function editMsg(){
  const el=document.getElementById('msgText');
  const v=prompt('Mensagem:',el.innerText);
  if(v!==null) el.innerHTML=v.replace(/\n/g,'<br>');
}
function editSig(){
  const el=document.getElementById('sigEl');
  const v=prompt('Assinatura:',el.textContent.replace('— ',''));
  if(v!==null) el.textContent=v;
}
function editCaption(){
  const el=document.querySelector('.hero-caption');
  const v=prompt('Data / legenda:',el.textContent);
  if(v!==null) el.textContent=v;
}
</script>
<audio id="bgAudio" src="audio/musica.mp3" preload="auto"></audio>

</html>
</body>
